metadata.convention: All tillers compared to wild-type Nipponbare/Takanari at heading stage unless specified; rescue and double-mutant tests use their specific mutant comparison baseline as per FLASH-P pipeline rules (mutant + treatment vs mutant alone).

evidence.title: Control of tillering in rice
evidence.evidence_sentence: Loss-of-function mutant of MOC1 exhibits a monoculm phenotype without tillers.

evidence.title: Control of tillering in rice
evidence.evidence_sentence: Overexpression of MOC1 leads to the formation of higher-order tillers such as tertiary, quaternary, and quinary.

evidence.title: Potential of rice tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: moc3 mutant cannot form normal axillary meristems; severely reduced tillers.

evidence.title: MOC2 encodes FBP1
evidence.evidence_sentence: Loss of MOC2 causes a significant reduction in tiller number.

evidence.title: LAX and SPA
evidence.evidence_sentence: lax1 single mutant shows reduced axillary bud formation.

evidence.title: LAX PANICLE2
evidence.evidence_sentence: lax2 single mutant: sparse panicle; reduced secondary branches and spikelets; fewer tillers.

evidence.title: LAX PANICLE2
evidence.evidence_sentence: lax1 lax2 double mutant: severe reduction in secondary branches and spikelets; dramatic tiller loss; 'All SBs and spikelets except terminal spikelets were absent'.

evidence.title: LAX PANICLE2
evidence.evidence_sentence: lax2 moc1 double mutant: complete loss of all branching except primary branches; monoculm.

evidence.title: TILLERS ABSENT1
evidence.evidence_sentence: tab1-1 produces no tillers even in 2-month-old shoots.

evidence.title: Antagonistic action of TAB1 and FON2
evidence.evidence_sentence: In fon2 mutant sizes of the SAM and inflorescence meristem were increased; axillary meristems increased.

evidence.title: Antagonistic TAB1 FON2
evidence.evidence_sentence: In FON2 overexpressor, axillary meristem formation is inhibited.

evidence.title: Antagonistic TAB1 FON2
evidence.evidence_sentence: tab1 fon2 double mutant produces a few tillers (partial rescue of tab1 tillerless phenotype).
evidence.claim: tab1 fon2 partial rescue of tab1

evidence.title: FC1 downstream of SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: d3 mutant is tillering dwarf with excessive tillers.

evidence.title: d14 SL-insensitive mutant
evidence.evidence_sentence: d14 mutant shows accelerated outgrowth of tillers; SL-insensitive.

evidence.title: D53 SL repressor
evidence.evidence_sentence: d53 dominant mutant has total tiller number about three times that of wild type.

evidence.title: D14-SCFD3 degradation of D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: pActin::D53-GFP transgenic plants showed moderate increase in tillering.

evidence.title: D10 CCD8
evidence.evidence_sentence: d10 SL-biosynthesis mutant shows high-tillering dwarf phenotype.

evidence.title: Genetic basis rice plant architecture
evidence.evidence_sentence: d17/htd1 SL-biosynthesis mutant shows high-tillering dwarf phenotype.

evidence.title: DWARF27 iron-containing SL biosynthesis
evidence.evidence_sentence: d27 final tiller number is three times that of the wild type.

evidence.title: D88/D14L SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: d88/d14L weak SL-insensitive phenotype with moderately increased tillers.

evidence.title: Diverse roles of MAX1 homologs in rice
evidence.evidence_sentence: Os900 max1 mutant shows increased tillers.

evidence.title: OsTB1 negatively regulates lateral branching
evidence.evidence_sentence: fc1 mutant (OsTB1 loss-of-function) causes increase in the number of tillers; NIL-fc1 produces 143% more panicles.

evidence.title: OsTB1 negatively regulates branching
evidence.evidence_sentence: Transgenic rice plants overexpressing OsTB1 exhibited markedly reduced lateral branching.

evidence.title: OsSPL14 regulation by miR156
evidence.evidence_sentence: ipa1-1D: miR156 binding site mutation, IPA1 accumulation, reduced tiller number.

evidence.title: Potential of rice tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: ipa1-2D novel allele generates large panicles and moderate panicle number, with reduced tillers.

evidence.title: IPA1 downstream D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: ipa1-10 loss-of-function: more tillers, smaller panicles.

evidence.title: miR156-OsSPL14 module
evidence.evidence_sentence: miR156 OE degrades OsSPL14 mRNA, resulting in increased tiller number.

evidence.title: MiR529a rice plant height tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: miR529a OE increases tiller number by targeting OsSPL14.

evidence.title: Cytokinin oxidase regulates rice grain production
evidence.evidence_sentence: Gn1a reduced-function allele: more tillers and more grains per panicle due to CK accumulation.

evidence.title: OsCKX2 RNAi tillers
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsCKX2-RNAi: 27-81% increased panicle/tiller number vs wild-type.

evidence.title: OsCKX2 RNAi rice yield
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsCKX2-OE: reduced tillers (gene-dosage dependent).

evidence.title: Genetic basis rice plant architecture
evidence.evidence_sentence: osckx4 increases tillers via CK accumulation.

evidence.title: SL promotes CK degradation via OsCKX9
evidence.evidence_sentence: osckx9 mutant: increased tillers, decreased plant height and panicle size.

evidence.title: SL promotes CK degradation
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsCKX9-OX: increased tillers, decreased height and panicle branches (paradox — CK depletion in node but altered SL response).

evidence.title: OsCKX11 source-sink
evidence.evidence_sentence: osckx11 increases tiller number and alters source-sink relationship.

evidence.title: Rice cytokinin signaling
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsIPT OE increases cytokinin levels; expected to promote tillering.

evidence.title: Rice cytokinin signaling
evidence.evidence_sentence: osipt4/7 loss reduces CK biosynthesis and expected reduced tiller outgrowth.

evidence.title: Rice CK signaling
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsAHP-RNAi plants exhibited phenotypes expected for a deficiency in cytokinin signaling, including dwarfism and reduced tiller numbers.

evidence.title: OHK4/OsHK4 regulates inflorescence
evidence.evidence_sentence: ohk4 loss-of-function: reduced panicle, decreased higher-order tillers.

evidence.title: NGR5 green revolution
evidence.evidence_sentence: ngr5 loss-of-function mutant failed to induce tiller outgrowth in response to nitrogen.

evidence.title: NGR5 chromatin modulation
evidence.evidence_sentence: NGR5-OE/high-expression allele: increased tiller number and yield.

evidence.title: OsTCP19 N adaptation
evidence.evidence_sentence: Accessions with 29-bp insertion in OsTCP19 promoter (loss of expression) show high tillering response to nitrogen.

evidence.title: OsTCP19
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsTCP19-OE: reduced tillers via DLT repression.

evidence.title: DLT BR signaling
evidence.evidence_sentence: dlt mutant: dwarf and low tillering phenotype.

evidence.title: OsLBD37 N signaling
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsLBD37-OE: represses OsTCP19 and increases tillers.

evidence.title: NRT1.1B natural variation
evidence.evidence_sentence: Indica NRT1.1B allele in japonica background increases tiller number and NUE.

evidence.title: OsNLP4-OsNiR cascade
evidence.evidence_sentence: osnlp4 mutant: significantly decreased tiller number and plant height.

evidence.title: TAD1 MOC1 degradation
evidence.evidence_sentence: tad1 mutant showed an increased tiller number.

evidence.title: TAD1
evidence.evidence_sentence: TAD1-overexpressing transgenic plants showed a reduced tiller number.

evidence.title: APC/CTE tillering MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: te mutant displays drastically increased tiller number (~3-fold).

evidence.title: APC/CTE tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: TE-OE reduced tiller number.

evidence.title: APC/CTE tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: te moc1-5 double: reduced tillers like moc1-5 alone; MOC1 epistatic over TE.
evidence.claim: te moc1 is low tiller like moc1

evidence.title: SLR1 MOC1 coordination
evidence.evidence_sentence: slr1 recessive mutant exhibited fewer tillers and taller stature.

evidence.title: SLR1 MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: SLR1-OE: tiller number was increased.

evidence.title: SLR1 MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: slr1 moc1 double: low tillers like moc1 alone (moc1 epistatic).

evidence.title: Green revolution SD1
evidence.evidence_sentence: sd1 (GA20ox2 null) produces more tillers and shorter plants.

evidence.title: SLR1 MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: GA20ox1-OE line: fewer tillers and taller stature.

evidence.title: IPI1 tissue-specific ubiquitination
evidence.evidence_sentence: ipi1-1 CRISPR mutant: reduced IPA1 in shoot apex causing increased tillers.

evidence.title: IPI1
evidence.evidence_sentence: Ub:IPI1-OE: increased IPA1 accumulation in shoot apex, reduced tillers.

evidence.title: OsSHI1 IPA1
evidence.evidence_sentence: shi1 mutant: dramatically reduced tiller number.

evidence.title: OsSHI1 IPA1
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsSHI1-OE: reduced plant height, decreased panicle, ectopic tillers at upper internodes but reduced normal tillers.

evidence.title: OsMADS57 OsTB1 D14
evidence.evidence_sentence: osmads57-1 activation-tagged: 28 tillers vs WT 10.

evidence.title: OsMADS57
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsMADS57-antisense: reduced tillers.

evidence.title: OsMADS57 miR444
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsMIR444a-OE lines: suppresses OsMADS57 expression, fewer tillers.

evidence.title: Rice Circadian Clock
evidence.evidence_sentence: oscca1 mutant shows more tillers and delayed flowering.

evidence.title: Rice Clock
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsCCA1-OE: fewer tillers than transgenic control.

evidence.title: Rice Clock
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsPRR1-OE: reduced tiller numbers.

evidence.title: OsPIN1 auxin transport
evidence.evidence_sentence: Knockdown of OsPIN1a decreases crown roots and increases tiller number.

evidence.title: OsPIN1b CRISPR rice architecture
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsPIN1b CRISPR mutant: increased tiller numbers, altered root gravitropism.

evidence.title: OsPIN2 overexpression
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsPIN2-OE leads to increased tiller numbers, tiller angle and shorter plant.

evidence.title: OsPIN9 ammonium tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: ospin9 knockout: decreased tillering.

evidence.title: OsPIN9
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsPIN9-OE: increased tillering.

evidence.title: OsTIR1 OsAFB redundancy
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsTIR1/OsAFB2 double mutants show severely compromised plant development including tillering defects.

evidence.title: OsTB2 natural variation
evidence.evidence_sentence: japonica OsTB2-3bp+ allele: promotes axillary bud elongation, increased tillers.

evidence.title: DST OsCKX2
evidence.evidence_sentence: reg1 allele of DST: reduced OsCKX2 expression, elevated CK, enhanced grain number and moderately increased tillers (Gn1a-independent +20% yield).

evidence.title: DST OsCKX2
evidence.evidence_sentence: DST-OE: activates OsCKX2, reduced CK, reduced panicle branches and grain number; reduces tillers.

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: WT + 10uM GR24 completely inhibited the outgrowth of third leaf tiller buds.

evidence.title: D27 iron-containing
evidence.evidence_sentence: d27 + 1.0 uM GR24 fully rescues tillering dwarf phenotype.

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: d10-2 + 1 uM GR24: sufficient to inhibit the outgrowth of first and second leaf buds; SL-biosynthesis-mutant responds.

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: d17 SL-biosynthesis mutant + GR24: phenotype rescued; SL-responsive.

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: d3-2 + 10uM GR24: tillers not suppressed; SL-insensitive.

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: d14 + GR24 treatment: axillary buds still grow (SL-insensitive).

evidence.title: D53 SL repressor
evidence.evidence_sentence: d53 is resistant to exogenous application of GR24.

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: fc1 + 10uM GR24: third and fourth leaf tiller buds were not affected (SL-insensitive via FC1 requirement).

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: BAP (cytokinin) treatment suppresses FC1 expression and promotes tiller bud outgrowth.

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: Apical IAA application suppresses bud outgrowth via BRC1/FC1 induction.

evidence.title: OsPIN1 auxin NAA
evidence.evidence_sentence: NAA treatment rescued OsPIN1 RNAi phenotype and suppressed WT tillering.

evidence.title: D27 rice
evidence.evidence_sentence: NPA (auxin transport inhibitor, similar to TIBA) treatment largely rescued tiller number; blocks polar auxin transport.

evidence.title: SLR1 MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: GA (10^-5 M) 1 month treatment: decreased tiller number.

evidence.title: SLR1 MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: PBZ (paclobutrazol, GA inhibitor) significantly increased tiller number and decreased plant height.

evidence.title: NGR5 nitrogen
evidence.evidence_sentence: High nitrogen fertilization causes downregulation of OsTB1 via NGR5-PRC2 H3K27me3 and promotes tiller formation.

evidence.title: NGR5
evidence.evidence_sentence: Low nitrogen: reduced tillers, NGR5 not accumulated.

evidence.title: NGR5 green revolution
evidence.evidence_sentence: ngr5 + high N: no tiller response to nitrogen (N-insensitive) compared to ngr5 alone.

evidence.title: SL under P deficiency
evidence.evidence_sentence: Low P conditions elevate SL biosynthesis genes D10/D17 and reduce tiller bud outgrowth.

evidence.title: IPA1 downstream D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: ipa1-1D significantly suppressed the high tillering phenotype of d53.
evidence.claim: d53 ipa1-1D suppression of d53 high-tiller

evidence.title: IPA1 D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: ipa1-1D could repress the high-tillering phenotype of d27.
evidence.claim: d27 ipa1-1D suppression of d27 high-tiller

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: 35S-FC1/d3-2 lines showed partial rescue of d3 defects (plant height, tiller number, stem thickness).
evidence.claim: FC1-OE in d3 partial rescue to fewer tillers

evidence.title: D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: D53-RNAi in d3 background obviously reduced the tiller number.

evidence.title: D14-SCFD3
evidence.evidence_sentence: D53-RNAi in d14 background: tiller number restored to nearly wild type levels.

evidence.title: D14-SCFD3
evidence.evidence_sentence: d14 d53 double mutant showed dwarf tillering phenotype resembling d14 and d53 parental plants (no additive effect, epistatic).

evidence.title: D14-SCFD3
evidence.evidence_sentence: d3 d53 double: dwarf tillering phenotype resembling d3; d3 phenotype epistatic over d53.

evidence.title: D27
evidence.evidence_sentence: d27d10 double mutant showed similar tiller number and plant height to d10 (d10 epistatic).

evidence.title: LAX1 regulation
evidence.evidence_sentence: lax1 moc1 double mutant shows enhanced suppression of axillary meristem formation.

evidence.title: Sucrose D53 tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: Exogenous sucrose promotes D53 accumulation and tillering in rice.

evidence.title: Sucrose D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: Sucrose effect on tillering partially depends on D53; d53 does not further increase with sucrose.

evidence.title: Rice Clock SL sugar
evidence.evidence_sentence: Panicle removal (decapitation, DeP): increased sugar content, reduced OsCCA1 expression, threefold tiller increase.

evidence.title: Rice Clock
evidence.evidence_sentence: Leaf removal (defoliation, DeF): decreased sugars, elevated OsCCA1, reduced tillers.

evidence.title: GT1 grassy tiller
evidence.evidence_sentence: gt1 mutant: increased tiller bud outgrowth.

evidence.title: PROG1 cluster domestication
evidence.evidence_sentence: ~110 kb deletion eliminating PROG1 cluster increased tiller number (domestication).

evidence.title: TIG1 tiller angle
evidence.evidence_sentence: tig1 allele: pleiotropic effects including altered tiller number.

evidence.title: OsAAP3 amino acid tillers
evidence.evidence_sentence: Knocking out OsAAP3 can promote growth of buds and effective tillers.

evidence.title: OsAAP5 CK tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsAAP5-OE: altered amino acid levels affect CK biosynthesis; reduced tillers.

evidence.title: GS1;2 tiller
evidence.evidence_sentence: gs1;2 mutant: reduced tiller bud growth due to reduced CK production.

evidence.title: OsBZR1 D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: osbzr1 loss: failure to recruit D53 to OsTB1 promoter; increased tiller outgrowth.

evidence.title: BR SL D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: Exogenous BR stabilizes OsBZR1-D53 complex, representing OsTB1 and reducing tiller outgrowth.

evidence.title: OsAAP7 amino acid tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: Blocking of OsAAP7 promoted tillering and yield by determining basic and neutral amino acids accumulation.

evidence.title: OsVIL2 axillary buds
evidence.evidence_sentence: osvil2 shows defective axillary bud outgrowth, reduced tillers.

evidence.title: Tn1a natural variation tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: Natural variation in Tn1a promoter increases rice tillering via TIF1 interaction.

evidence.title: IPA1 binding analysis
evidence.evidence_sentence: dep1 mutant: reduced panicle length, reduced grain number, altered tiller number.

evidence.title: Asparagine synthetase tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: asn1 mutant reduces asparagine concentration and inhibits tiller outgrowth.

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: Overexpression of OsTB1 partially suppressed the tiller-overproducing phenotype of dwarf3 (d3).

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: d10 d3 double: high-tillering dwarf like each single mutant (parallel pathways converge).

evidence.title: D14-SCFD3
evidence.evidence_sentence: d14 d53 double: resembling d14 and d53 parental plants.

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: Kinetin (cytokinin) treatment suppresses FC1 expression and promotes bud outgrowth.

evidence.title: FC1 SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: BAP treatment clearly suppressed FC1 expression in a concentration-dependent manner and promoted bud outgrowth.

evidence.title: NPF7.7 tillers
evidence.evidence_sentence: NPF7.7-OE increases effective tiller number by enhancing N uptake.

evidence.title: NPF7 tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: NPF7.1-OE promotes rice axillary buds outgrowth.

evidence.title: NPF7 tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: npf7.4 knockout promotes rice axillary buds outgrowth.

evidence.title: D10 CCD8 review cross
evidence.evidence_sentence: SL biosynthesis mutant combinations give similar high-tiller phenotype (d10 d14 etc).

evidence.title: Rice tillering potential
evidence.evidence_sentence: fon1 mutant forms axillary buds normally but fails to elongate tiller buds.

evidence.title: OsARF triple mutant
evidence.evidence_sentence: osarf12 osarf17 osarf25 triple mutant: altered tiller angle and increased tillers.

evidence.title: Auxin rice review
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsIAA stabilized variants block auxin signaling, partially derepress bud outgrowth.

evidence.title: Auxin rice review
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsYUCCA mutants: reduced auxin synthesis affects crown roots and altered tiller dynamics.

evidence.title: Auxin rice review
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsTAR2 loss reduces IAA biosynthesis, affecting architecture and tiller number.

evidence.title: OsAUX/LAX rice
evidence.evidence_sentence: oslax1/2/3 triple mutant: strongly reduced axillary meristem formation.

evidence.title: IPA1 D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: d53 ipa1-1D double: IPA1 accumulation suppresses d53 high tillering.

evidence.title: IPI1 tissue-specific
evidence.evidence_sentence: Ub:IPI1 in ipa1-1D background: reverted thick culm and panicle size phenotypes of ipa1-1D (IPI1 dominant).

evidence.title: OsSHI1 IPA1
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsSHI1-OE/35S:IPA1-Flag double OE: recovered tiller development relative to 35S:IPA1 alone (OsSHI1 inhibits IPA1).
evidence.claim: OsSHI1-OE partially rescues IPA1-OE reduced tillers

evidence.title: FC1 downstream SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: With or without BAP treatment, levels of FC1 mRNA in d3 and d10 were not significantly different; BAP acts independently of SL but d3 background already high-tillering.

evidence.title: Sucrose SL bud
evidence.evidence_sentence: T6P signaling (via TPS overexpression or sucrose) promotes bud outgrowth.

evidence.title: P deficiency SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: Exogenous orobanchol (natural rice SL) inhibits tiller outgrowth similar to GR24.

evidence.title: SLs shoot branching
evidence.evidence_sentence: rac-GR24 synthetic SL: inhibits axillary bud outgrowth in WT.

evidence.title: D53 SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: Reducing D53 expression in d53 background drastically reduced the tiller number.

evidence.title: MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: Wild-type Nipponbare produces characteristic 10-15 tillers at heading stage (baseline).

evidence.title: MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: moc1 d10 double mutant: monoculm (moc1 epistatic over high-tillering d10).

evidence.title: SL CK OsCKX9
evidence.evidence_sentence: osckx9 d27 double mutant: intermediate phenotype between singles.

evidence.title: IPA1 D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: Upon SL treatment, tiller number is unchanged in ipa1-10 (loss-of-function) and d14 ipa1-10; IPA1 required for SL-mediated tiller inhibition.
evidence.claim: d14 + IPA1-OE rescues via IPA1 downstream

evidence.title: Rice Clock
evidence.evidence_sentence: oscca1 d14 double: genetic data confirm D14 acts downstream; phenotype like d14.

evidence.title: Rice Clock
evidence.evidence_sentence: oscca1 ostb1 double: phenotype resembles ostb1 single mutant (ostb1 epistatic).

evidence.title: OsSHI1 IPA1
evidence.evidence_sentence: shi1 ipa1 double: phenotype resembles ipa1 single (ipa1 downstream of shi1).

evidence.title: OsSHI1 IPA1
evidence.evidence_sentence: shi1 dep1 double: phenotype resembles dep1 single (dep1 downstream).

evidence.title: OHK4 IPA1
evidence.evidence_sentence: ohk4 ipa1 double: phenotype similar to ipa1; IPA1 is downstream of OsHK4 in panicle feedback.

evidence.title: OHK4 IPA1
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsRR21-OE in ohk4 background: partial rescue of panicle and tiller defects.

evidence.title: NGR5 Green Revolution
evidence.evidence_sentence: NGR5-OE + GA treatment: GA-induced NGR5 degradation partially counteracts OE effect.
evidence.claim: NGR5-OE + GA partial reduction vs NGR5-OE alone

evidence.title: NGR5
evidence.evidence_sentence: NGR5-high-expression allele + high nitrogen: maximal tiller number and yield (synergy).

evidence.title: SL N tiller review
evidence.evidence_sentence: Under low N, d53 mutant still shows more tillers than WT; d53 partially insensitive to N-status.
evidence.claim: d53 + low N still high tillers

evidence.title: SL nitrogen
evidence.evidence_sentence: Under N-deficient conditions, tiller number reduced in both WT and d3 and d10; N effect partially SL-independent.
evidence.claim: d3 + low N reduced vs d3 alone

evidence.title: NGR5
evidence.evidence_sentence: ngr5 + GR24: SL signaling intact but N response absent; tillers reduced similar to GR24 alone (N-insensitive but SL-sensitive).

evidence.title: Rice Clock
evidence.evidence_sentence: Shading reduces photosynthesis and sucrose, reducing tillers via increased OsCCA1.

evidence.title: Drought stress tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: Drought stress increases ABA and decreases tillers via NCED1 induction.

evidence.title: BR SL D53 BZR1
evidence.evidence_sentence: bzr1 d53 double: high-tillering like d53 (d53 epistatic for tiller count).

evidence.title: NGR5
evidence.evidence_sentence: ngr5 + PBZ: GA blockade stabilizes SLR1 but no NGR5 to convert signal; moderate tiller increase via SLR1-MOC1 axis.
evidence.claim: ngr5 + PBZ moderate increase via SLR1-MOC1

evidence.title: SLR1 MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: SLR1-OE resistant to GA degradation: retains high tiller phenotype with GA treatment.

evidence.title: OsPIN9 NH4
evidence.evidence_sentence: Ammonium supply promotes tillers via OsPIN9 induction and CK production.

evidence.title: RCN127 F-box OsTB1
evidence.evidence_sentence: RCN127 F-box protein enhances rice tillering by mediating degradation of OsTB1 and OsTCP19.

evidence.title: OsSTP15 sugar transporter
evidence.evidence_sentence: osstp15 knockout: increased tiller number due to higher sugar content in shoot base.

evidence.title: miR396 GRF tiller
evidence.evidence_sentence: miR396 OE targets OsGRF TFs affecting panicle and tillers indirectly.

evidence.title: Sucrose D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: Sucrose antagonizes GR24 inhibition of tillering by stabilizing D53.
evidence.claim: GR24 + sucrose tillers rise vs GR24 alone

evidence.title: Rice Clock SL
evidence.evidence_sentence: Decapitation + GR24: GR24 partially blocks tiller outgrowth induced by decapitation (SL acts downstream of sugar signal).
evidence.claim: DeP + GR24 reduced vs DeP alone

evidence.title: D53
evidence.evidence_sentence: d14 d53 + GR24: GR24 does not reduce tillers (SL signaling blocked at receptor + repressor levels).

evidence.title: SLR1 MOC1
evidence.evidence_sentence: SLR1-OE in tad1 background: tiller number additively elevated (both stabilize MOC1).

evidence.title: CK signaling
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsHK6 is cytokinin receptor; loss slightly reduces CK signaling and tillers.

evidence.title: CK signaling
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsRR type-A OE: negative feedback on CK signaling reduces tillers.

evidence.title: TAB1 axillary meristem
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsWOX4 plays role in maintaining axillary meristem after establishment; loss reduces tiller maintenance.

evidence.title: Rice tillering potential
evidence.evidence_sentence: MP3 allele of OsTB1/FC1: moderately increased tiller/panicle number without compromising spikelet.

evidence.title: Asparagine synthetase
evidence.evidence_sentence: asn1 + high N: failed to increase tillers normally seen with high N (Asn essential for N signaling to buds).

evidence.title: OsVIL2 axillary
evidence.evidence_sentence: osvil2 ostb1 double: complex phenotype, reduced overall tillers.

evidence.title: Cold OsMADS57 OsTB1
evidence.evidence_sentence: Cold stress: OsMADS57+OsTB1 switch to defense/cold mode, reducing D14 expression and tiller outgrowth.

evidence.title: SL CK auxin rice
evidence.evidence_sentence: ACC (ethylene precursor) treatment slightly reduces tiller outgrowth in rice.

evidence.title: Rice CK metabolism
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsIPT7-OE increases cytokinin levels and promotes tillering.

evidence.title: Rice tillering potential
evidence.evidence_sentence: Takanari wild-type at 12th leaf: 10 tillers (4 primary, 6 secondary) baseline reference.

evidence.title: Rice tillering potential
evidence.evidence_sentence: NIL-MP3 at 12th leaf: 13 tillers (5 primary, 8 secondary) +28% panicles vs Takanari.

evidence.title: Rice tillering potential
evidence.evidence_sentence: NIL-fc1 at 12th leaf: 31 tillers (7 primary, 17 secondary, 7 tertiary) +143% panicles vs Takanari; thinner lighter tillers cause lodging.

evidence.title: Rice tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: NIL-MP3 in P-deficient soil still tended to produce more tillers than Takanari.
evidence.claim: NIL-MP3 + low P still more tillers than Takanari low P

evidence.title: Rice tillering
evidence.evidence_sentence: MP3 further enhances above-ground biomass by 3.5% at elevated CO2 (579 umol/mol).

evidence.title: Auxin rice review
evidence.evidence_sentence: OsYUCCA1-OE elevates auxin, reduces tillers via enhanced apical dominance.
